device-002.content:
! Cisco Catalyst 9300 - Running Configuration
version 17.9.4
hostname Access-Switch-HN-01
no aaa new-model
ip domain-name company.local
ip ssh version 2
interface GigabitEthernet1/0/1
 description Uplink to Core
 switchport trunk encapsulation dot1q
 switchport mode trunk
!
interface GigabitEthernet1/0/2-24
 switchport access vlan 10
 switchport mode access
!
interface Vlan1
 ip address 10.1.2.1 255.255.255.0
!
ip default-gateway 10.1.2.254
snmp-server community cisco-ro-hn RO
snmp-server community cisco-rw RW
line vty 0 4
 transport input ssh
 login local
!

device-003.content:
! Ubiquoss EP-8032 OLT - Running Configuration
hostname OLT-DaNang-01
!
management-ip 10.2.1.1 255.255.255.0 10.2.1.254
!
user ubiquoss password encrypted xxx
!
snmp-server community ubiquoss-ro ro
!
interface eth 0/1
 description NNI-Uplink
!
interface pon 0/1
 ont 1 serial-number SN12345678
 ont 2 serial-number SN12345679
!
!

device-004.content:
! Cisco ASR 1002 - IOS-XE Running Configuration
version 17.9.4
hostname Edge-Router-HCM-01
ip domain name company.local
ip ssh version 2
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 description WAN-Primary
 ip address 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.252
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description LAN
 ip address 10.3.1.1 255.255.255.0
!
router ospf 1
 router-id 10.3.1.1
 network 10.3.1.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
!
ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 203.0.113.2
snmp-server community asr-hcm-ro ro
snmp-server user snmp_asr auth sha ASR_Auth_Secret priv aes 128 ASR_Priv_Secret
!

device-006.content:
! HDN-SW-48 - Running Configuration
hostname HDN-Switch-Backbone
!
interface vlan 1
 ip address 10.1.4.1 255.255.255.0
!
ip default-gateway 10.1.4.254
!
vlan 10
 name Users
vlan 20
 name Servers
!
interface range gigabitEthernet 1/0/1-2
 switchport mode trunk
!
interface range gigabitEthernet 1/0/3-24
 switchport access vlan 10
!
snmp-server community hdn-backbone ro
!

device-007.content:
! Samsung EX-6210 - Running Configuration
hostname Samsung-Exalink-Agg
!
management ip 10.3.2.1 255.255.255.0 10.3.2.254
!
interface ethernet 0/1
 description Uplink-Core
 mode trunk
!
interface ethernet 0/2-24
 vlan 10
 mode access
!
snmp-server community samsung-ex-ro read-only
!
